name: lightcircle-extension
description: LightCircle browser extension for cookie-based platform authentication

scripts.build: rimraf dist && vite build && copy manifest.json dist\manifest.json && cd dist && jar -cvf ../extension.zip .
scripts.dev: rimraf dist && cross-env HOT_RELOAD_EXTENSION_VITE_PORT=8081 NODE_ENV=development dotenv -e ../../.env -- vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts --mode development --watch
